current_work_in_progress: Day 1 evidence baseline and first coherent evolution checkpoint
next_highest_value_action: Capture a current desktop/mobile baseline of the real internal and customer shells, then improve the highest-friction shared operating transition without inventing data or weakening role boundaries.
known_risks: Multiple agents push directly to main; fetch and rebase before every push.
Admin and customer hosts serve one bundle but must expose different authority and navigation.
Mobile interaction, accessibility, and performance evidence remain materially weaker than backend correctness evidence.
User-facing app changes require a full cache build-id bump and served-checkout sync.
